data.title: QVC Group announces 24/7 livestreaming on TikTok
data.description: QVC Group said the 24/7 live-shopping experience will specifically feature original QVC and HSN content created just for TikTok. Meanwhile, Amazon has reportedly made a bid to acquire the social media platform.

data.title: Airbus adds 5 million parts to an ecommerce platform
data.description: The move consolidates Airbus’s aftermarket support for operators, lessors, and MRO providers into a single digital storefront, phasing out the decades-old Airbus Spares platform.

data.title: GrowGeneration unveils a B2B portal and a strategic overhaul
data.description: The new platform features real-time inventory, automated quotes, and direct ordering, with tools for account management, logistics, and financing.

data.title: Walmart seeks supply chain help from Cropin's AI-powered platform
data.description: Cropin's tech joins other AI solutions that Walmart has recently adopted in a year when supply chain technology is in demand.

data.title: Shop Circle raises $60 million to accelerate U.S. AI B2B expansion
data.description: Shop Circle plans to scale its footprint in North America through targeted acquisitions and expanded go-to-market efforts. Its recent acquisition of Aiden—an AI-driven guided selling platform.
